- [ ] New feature

## Testing

How was this tested?

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`yarn test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`yarn workspace idle-app typecheck`)
- [ ] Tested on web (`yarn web`)
- [ ] Tested on iOS (TestFlight or simulator)

## Breaking changes

Does this change anything that existing users or integrations depend on?
